name: specscribe-status
description: Read-only, live-updating in-editor view of a SpecScribe project's dashboard and epics surfaces. All rendering happens in the SpecScribe C# core; this extension is a thin host shim (ADR 0005).

specscribe.toolPath.markdownDescription: Path to the SpecScribe tool the extension spawns for rendering — an executable, or a `SpecScribe.dll` to run via `dotnet`. Leave empty to use the binary bundled with the extension (when packaged) or `specscribe` on PATH.
